purpose: Initial hypothesis map for age group to age group img2img face transformation coefficients.
important_note: These are starting points, not universal truth. Validate per source image with cosine_similarity, age error, LPIPS, and visual review.

parameters_included.strength: img2img denoise strength; higher changes age more but risks identity drift
parameters_included.ip_adapter_scale: face identity/reference lock; higher preserves identity but can resist age change
parameters_included.cfg: prompt guidance; higher follows age prompt more but can introduce artifacts
parameters_included.steps: fixed inference steps; always use 20 for this coefficient map
parameters_included.prompt_weight: which prompt style should be used with this transition

selection_order: filter obviously broken images visually if possible
keep cosine_similarity above a task-specific floor
minimize age absolute error / delta error
use LPIPS and composite_score as tie breakers
confirm best preset on several seeds

notes: identity-preserving refresh; avoid strong age change
keep scheduler/model fixed when comparing coefficients
young sources often resist aging; lower IP and increase strength/LoRA/CFG
male aging: gray hair, receding hairline, thinning/balding cues can help
keep scheduler/model fixed when comparing coefficients

schema_note: coefficients[gender][source_group].targets[target_group].target_age_delta = target_anchor_age - source_anchor_age. Negative means rejuvenation, positive means aging.
